readme.title: My Stars
readme.description: A generated catalog of starred GitHub repositories, grouped into stable categories.

site.title: My Stars Atlas
site.heroDescription: Explore starred repositories with progressive chunk loading, category-first browsing, debounced search, and a tailored dark interface.

seo.description: Browse starred GitHub repositories with progressive loading, category sections, search, filters, and sorting.
seo.ogDescription: A searchable, installable catalog of starred repositories with progressive chunk loading and category-first browsing.
seo.twitterDescription: Explore starred repositories by category, language, popularity, and recency without loading the whole dataset upfront.

manifest.description: A searchable, installable catalog of starred GitHub repositories with progressive chunk loading.
